global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encourages users to save confidently with a call to action.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Several overlapping geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue create a modern and abstract visual effect.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'EarnPath', standing out against the blue background.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: White text in the center states 'Save with confidence', conveying a reassuring message.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below reads 'Built for peace of mind', adding context to the main message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Order now' encourages immediate action.

elements.label: Small circle shape
elements.description: A small circular shape in a lighter blue hue adds visual interest to the design.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter blue color overlaps with other shapes, enhancing the abstract theme.

elements.label: Small rectangle shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle in a lighter shade of blue adds depth to the composition.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge in the top right corner with the text 'SALE' draws attention to a promotional offer.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unclear element positioned in the center, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unclear element positioned near the center, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The central text reads 'Save with confidence', prominently displayed in white.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Builtfe pind Order now

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: The logo 'EarnPath' is displayed at the top, indicating the brand associated with the ad.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' emphasizes a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is prominently displayed below.
